g.aria-label: - Dropped support for Node 18 вҖ” Node 20 is now the minimum required version.
g.title: - Dropped support for Node 18 вҖ” Node 20 is now the minimum required version.

g.aria-label: - Added `--watch` to regenerate notes automatically on every new commit.
g.title: - Added `--watch` to regenerate notes automatically on every new commit.

g.aria-label: - Stream large diffs instead of buffering them in memory, reducing memory use on big changes.
g.title: - Stream large diffs instead of buffering them in memory, reducing memory use on big changes.

g.aria-label: - Cache the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.
g.title: - Cache the parsed config for roughly 3x faster startup.

g.aria-label: - Reject expired authentication tokens instead of returning a 500 error.
g.title: - Reject expired authentication tokens instead of returning a 500 error.

g.aria-label: - Handle an empty commit range gracefully instead of crashing.
g.title: - Handle an empty commit range gracefully instead of crashing.

g.aria-label: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-HEAD example.
g.title: - Expanded the quickstart with a tag-to-HEAD example.

g.text: From raw commits to a changelog
